name: R-9 color foreground tokens declare contrast_pair pointing at a background-color token per the §26 schema
command: node -e 'const y=require("fs").readFileSync(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT+"/design-tokens/registry.yaml","utf8");const blocks=y.split(/^  - id: /m).slice(1);const fg=blocks.filter(b=>{const id=b.split("\n")[0].trim();return /^color\.(text|brand|signal|legacy)/.test(id)});process.exit(fg.length>=1&&fg.every(b=>/^\s*contrast_pair: color\./m.test(b))?0:1)' && echo ok 1>&2
